---
title: "SO-101 Training & Inference"
---

Use this chapter as a reference pattern for end-to-end training and inference on SO-101 style tasks. It defines a lightweight flow from dataset preparation through policy validation.

## Workflow Overview

| Stage | Objective | Typical output |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Dataset preparation | Validate schema and split episodes | Cleaned dataset and metadata |
| Training run | Fit policy with reproducible parameters | Checkpoints and run metrics |
| Inference test | Replay policy against held-out data | Success, latency, and drift signals |
| Promotion review | Decide whether to publish candidate | Promote, hold, or retrain decision |

## Baseline Command Pattern

```bash
cd training/il
uv run python src/lerobot/train.py \
	--dataset.path <dataset-path> \
	--policy.type act \
	--output.dir <output-dir>
```

## Inference Smoke Test

```bash
python scripts/test-lerobot-inference.py \
	--policy-repo <policy-path-or-repo> \
	--dataset-dir <dataset-path> \
	--episode 0 --num-steps 30
```

## Related Documentation

- [LeRobot Training](lerobot-training.qmd)
- [LeRobot Inference](../inference/lerobot-inference.qmd)
- [MLOps SIL Inference Lifecycle](../mlops/sil-inference-lifecycle.qmd)
